description_long: This is a modern, semi-automatic rifle with a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by dark reddish-brown polymer or wooden furniture on the stock, pistol grip, and handguard. The rifle features a collapsible stock, allowing for adjustable length to suit different users or scenarios. The barrel is of standard length and is fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted into the lower receiver, and the rifle is equipped with classic iron sights, including a front post and a rear carry handle sight. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where reliability and adaptability are important.
description: A modern black rifle with reddish-brown collapsible stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights, featuring a standard barrel and flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the collapsible stock, pistol grip, handguard, detachable magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the muzzle with flash hider and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine, and the full length of the collapsible stock and handguard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
